_comment: Gameface-specific CSS properties (coh-* prefix). Each entry defines a testValue used by the CSS probe and a description for documentation. Edit testValue to use a value your game UI actually applies.

coh-enable-backdrop-filter.description: Enables the backdrop filter compositing pass for an element.

coh-simple-opacity.description: Uses a simplified opacity rendering path that skips compositing.

coh-font-fit-mode.description: Controls how text fits within its container when it overflows.

coh-font-fit-max-size.description: Maximum font size used by the coh-font-fit shrink algorithm.

coh-font-fit-min-size.description: Minimum font size used by the coh-font-fit shrink algorithm.

coh-custom-effect-name.description: Name of a registered custom GPU shader effect to apply to an element.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-1.description: Float parameter 1 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-2.description: Float parameter 2 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-3.description: Float parameter 3 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-4.description: Float parameter 4 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-5.description: Float parameter 5 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-6.description: Float parameter 6 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-7.description: Float parameter 7 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-8.description: Float parameter 8 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-9.description: Float parameter 9 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-10.description: Float parameter 10 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-11.description: Float parameter 11 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-float-param-12.description: Float parameter 12 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-string-param-1.description: String parameter 1 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-custom-effect-string-param-2.description: String parameter 2 passed to the custom GPU shader effect.

coh-composition-id.description: Identifies a composition layer for advanced rendering grouping.

coh-partitioned.description: Marks an element as partitioned for independent compositing.

coh-rendering-option.description: Renderer-specific option flags for an element.
